channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: King Charles and President Trump emphasise UK-US alliance and Middle East security at White House state dinner
item.description: During a state dinner at the White House, President Donald Trump and King Charles III highlighted the longstanding alliance between the United States and the United Kingdom, with a focus on global sec...

item.title: UCLA addresses student conduct concerns after protest disruption at law school event
item.description: During a Federalist Society event at UCLA School of Law on April 21, 2026, Department of Homeland Security general counsel James Percival faced a protest of more than 150 students, who reportedly made...

item.title: Wolfram: Warwick Thornton’s atmospheric but uneven follow-up to Sweet Country
item.description: Wolfram, directed by Warwick Thornton, serves as a follow-up to his acclaimed 2017 neo-western Sweet Country, set four years later in 1932. While it carries Thornton’s signature atmospheric style and ...

item.title: West Bengal Phase 2 Voting 2026: Key Contest Between Mamata Banerjee and Suvendu Adhikari
item.description: Today marks the second phase of voting in the West Bengal 2026 elections, with political focus sharply on Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee and her principal rival, Suvendu Adhikari. Both leaders are con...

item.title: Woman Returns a 23-Year-Old Letter Found in a Community Library, Forging a New Friendship
item.description: In Washington D.C.'s Mount Pleasant, Katie Slocum discovered a 23-year-old letter tucked inside a novel from a little free library. The letter, addressed to 'My Dearest Jackie' and written by a grandm...

item.title: UAE to leave OPEC+ reduces group’s influence but alliance continues coordination
item.description: The United Arab Emirates will officially leave OPEC+ on May 1, ending nearly six decades of membership. As the fourth-largest oil producer in the organization, this departure will reduce OPEC+'s share...

item.title: Tala Enhances Customer Verification to Curb Fraud Following CBK Guidelines
item.description: Tala, one of Kenya's top digital lenders, has stepped up its customer identification processes in response to stricter regulations from the Central Bank of Kenya (CBK) and rising identity-related frau...

item.title: Chinese automaker Hongqi explores manufacturing in Spain to expand in Europe
item.description: Chinese luxury carmaker Hongqi, historically known as the preferred brand of Mao Zedong, is exploring opportunities to produce vehicles in Europe through discussions with Stellantis at one of its Span...

item.title: Shihimba Primary School Faces Infrastructure Challenges as Parents Demand Urgent Action
item.description: Parents of Shihimba Primary School in Shinyalu constituency, Kakamega County, are seriously worried about the deteriorating conditions of the school. Many classrooms are mud-walled, lacking proper fur...

item.title: NYC Mayor and City Council Speaker Delay Budget Proposal Amid State Negotiations
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani and City Council Speaker Julie Menin, who have recently been at odds over how to resolve the city's multibillion-dollar budget deficit, have reached a temporary agre...

item.title: Kaduna Polo Club to host Dawule Baba Memorial Tournament from June 11-14
item.description: Kaduna go dey shine as the city don ready for big polo action wey go happen from June 11 to 14, 2026. The Kaduna Polo Club don announce say dem wan honour one of Nigeria’s polo legends, Dawule Baba, w...

item.title: Centre urges Supreme Court to approve device-level measures and data retention to curb digital arrest scams
item.description: The Union government has informed the Supreme Court that WhatsApp is considering blocking device IDs, not just accounts, involved in digital arrest scams, addressing the loophole where fraudsters swit...

item.title: Government proposes legislative changes to allow law enforcement to obtain warrants for all mail
item.description: The Carney government is proposing legislative amendments to the Canada Post Corporation Act, aiming to enable law enforcement to obtain warrants for searching and seizing mail of all sizes, not just ...

item.title: DCI Arraigns Suspects Found with Weapons in Vihiga Amid Online Claims of Inaction
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has responded to claims that it has been inactive in tackling criminal activities. According to a statement released on Tuesday, three suspects were re...

item.title: Washington Seeks Court Order to Allow Health Inspections at Geo Group Detention Centre
item.description: Washington state has requested that a federal judge compel The Geo Group, a private prison operator, to grant access to health inspectors at its for-profit immigration detention centre in Tacoma. The ...

item.title: Albanese announces $45 million initiative to streamline housing and energy approvals
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has unveiled a $45 million initiative aimed at cutting red tape in the approvals process for housing and energy projects. The plan seeks to reduce duplication between f...

item.title: Sunday Times editor takes special leave amid SIU investigation into misused public funds
item.description: Veteran journalist and Sunday Times editor Makhudu Sefara has been placed on special leave following investigations by the Special Investigating Unit (SIU) into misappropriated public funds linked to ...

item.title: Delta Police Arrest Officer Following Alleged Extra-Judicial Killing of Young Man
item.description: The Delta State Police Command don confirm say one police officer don kill one 28-year-old man, Mene Ogidi, for Effurun, Delta State. The matter start after video wey dey show the incident begin dey c...

item.title: Ontario Community Mourns OPP Sergeant Killed in Motorcycle Crash
item.description: Ontario is grieving the loss of OPP Sergeant Brandon Malcolm, 33, who died in a single-vehicle motorcycle collision on eastbound Highway 401 in Cobourg on Monday evening. Malcolm, a dedicated officer ...

item.title: Saskatchewan and Manitoba residents experience financial stress amid tax season changes
item.description: Residents of Saskatchewan and Manitoba are confronting significant financial challenges this tax season, a situation described as 'very scary' by some. Changes in federal and provincial tax policies, ...
